questions.question_text: You wrote a prompt and tested it once. It worked fine, so you deployed it to production. What's the main risk with this approach?

options.text: Users will provide unexpected inputs that break it
The prompt will become too expensive
The prompt will work too slowly

questions.question_text: You need test cases for your prompt evaluation. You have two options: write them by hand or use Claude to generate them. Which model should you use for generation?
You're running a prompt evaluation workflow. You've used Claude to generate some responses. What's the next step?

options.text: Feed the responses through a grader

questions.question_text: You want to measure how well your prompts actually work in practice. Which approach should you focus on?
You're using a model grader to evaluate responses. To get better scores than just middle-range numbers, what should you ask for alongside the score?
Which type of grader uses another AI model to assess the quality of outputs?
